title: Roar: The Story of the Southern Columbia Football Tigers
original_title: ROAR: The Story of the Southern Columbia Football Tigers
overview: The Southern Columbia Tigers high school football team faces unprecedented challenges as they go for a Pennsylvania record sixth consecutive state championship. This documentary is a look behind the scenes of the most decorated team in state history.
